title: Calamity mod like glass
description: makes glass look better in my opinion
body:
- **ABSOLUTLY REQUIRES SHADERS or other methods that allow blocks to have transparancy**
- **Requires Continuity... sorta**

Makes glass look like eutophic glass from terraria calamity mod but worse because i cant draw!

Check gallery for images

lune_iris on discord if you need help or whatever
